backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend with access-controlled endpoints for user profiles and booking requests, including submission, paginated retrieval, and admin-only access guards.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three UI removal tasks (an img element in BrideGroomEntrySection and two card elements in DecorSection) to their affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose, styling theme, and key functionality for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with SEO meta tags, Open Graph, and Twitter Card metadata for the Avsarvatika marriage hall brand, pointing to the React app entry script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections (including BrideGroomEntrySection) in order, handles authentication state, profile setup dialog, and toggles between public and admin views.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminReque: Admin view that fetches and displays paginated booking requests with details like name, phone, email, date, and package badge. Supports previous/next page navigation.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and saves the profile via a mutation hook. Prevents dismissal until the profile is saved.
frontend/src/components/BookingRequestFo: Booking request form component with validation, field state management, and submission via a React Query mutation hook, styled with green-accented inputs.
frontend/src/components/sections/AboutSe: Landing page 'About' section displaying four feature cards (Excellence, Personalized Service, Trusted Venue, Premium Quality) with icons and a brand description paragraph.
frontend/src/components/sections/Banquet: Landing page 'Banquet' section showcasing four venue features (capacity, catering, sound/light, ambiance) and four key statistics (guests, years, events, support).
frontend/src/components/sections/BrideGr: Landing page section presenting three bride and groom entry styles (Floral, Royal Chariot, Fog Effect) as styled cards with icons, highlights, and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Renders a contact and booking section with phone, email, address info, WhatsApp CTA buttons, and an embedded BookingRequestForm component.
frontend/src/components/sections/DecorSe: Displays a decoration services section with three themed cards (Floral Elegance, Custom Themes, Stage & Mandap) and a closing tagline block.
frontend/src/components/sections/EventSe: Shows a grid of four event types the venue hosts (weddings, birthdays, engagements, anniversaries) with icons, descriptions, and a 'Most Popular' badge on weddings.
frontend/src/components/sections/Facilit: Lists venue facilities across four categories (Venue Features, Amenities, Services, Outdoor Spaces) using Card components with checkmark list items.
frontend/src/components/sections/Gallery: Implements a filterable image gallery with category buttons and a lightbox dialog supporting previous/next navigation for full-size image viewing.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: A minimal full-screen hero section that displays a single full-bleed background image of the venue's decorated stage.
frontend/src/components/sections/Package: Renders three pricing package cards (Classic, Premium, Luxury) with feature lists, prices, and buttons to select a package or inquire via WhatsApp.
frontend/src/components/sections/Seminar: Presents the venue's corporate event offerings with four facility cards (AV setup, Wi-Fi, refreshments, event management) and three capacity/configuration stats.
frontend/src/components/sections/Special: Renders a section showcasing three specialist roles (Event Coordinators, Wedding Planners, Culinary Experts) with icons, names, and descriptions in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/components/sections/Testimo: Displays a grid of six client testimonials with star ratings, quote text, and avatar initials for the Avsarvatika marriage hall.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, and contact details (address, phone, WhatsApp, email) using BRAND constants. Includes smooth-scroll navigation and a dynamic copyright year.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Sticky site header with desktop and mobile (Sheet drawer) navigation menus that smooth-scroll to page sections. Displays the brand name and a hamburger menu for smaller screens.
frontend/src/constants/brand.ts: Exports a frozen BRAND constant containing the business name, tagline, contact details, and address for Avsarvatika marriage hall.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend interactions including fetching/saving user profiles, checking admin status, submitting booking requests, and paginating booking requests.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that configures Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines a greenery-themed CSS custom property palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch variables), border radii, fonts, shadows, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3), recording three completed features that remove specific image and card elements from BrideGroomEntrySection and an adjacent section, with no new feature requests or known issues.
